posts.text: SBI shares drop 6.6% despite record ₹80,032 crore profit

posts.author: WideCalls
posts.text: SBI Dividend Record Date on a weekend — A newbie question. SBI declared a dividend of Rs 17.35 with record date as 16th May (Saturday). Does it mean that stock will trade ex dividend on 15th May itself?

posts.author: neha1101
posts.text: SBI and Profits — I am invested in SBI. Today, I saw a report that the Bank has declared a dividend of ₹17.35 per share. While regularly tracking and comparing quarterly profits of the companies I invest in, I had overlooked the bigger picture — the annual numbers. It was quite striking to realise that, among the companies that have declared Q4 results so far, SBI stands as the No. 2 company in India after Reliance in terms of annual net profit, at an impressive ₹80,032 crore. A PSU bank emerging as the second most profitable company in India is truly remarkable. I had always assumed that the…
